picks.quote: I'm taking Abdul Hussein... Abdul Hussein will beat Cody Gibson by first round knockout.

Third leg of the parlay, we're taking John Pork in the main on the main card against Damian Rpeky. We're taking Mugamemed Zangov or again John Pork to win

I'm going D Latt first round knockout win over Wellington Turman.
not to be super anti- Steve, I'm going to go Raman Temer in this one... Give me the steroid sheet and tearov to win.
I need him to finish Brenine Hiro. I think he should be able to do so... inside the distance two-leg parlay between Magamemed Talav and Magan and Goliath
